title: coryphantha ramillosa subsp. ramillosa
intro: Coryphantha ramillosa subsp. ramillosa, also known as the 'Ram's Horn Prickly Pear', is a species of cactus native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of mucilages, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of Coryphantha ramillosa subsp. ramillosa include its ability to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
